Yes, Rudolf Schwarzkogler was closely associated with the Viennese Actionism group, while Howard Zieff was an American television commercial director. 

- Rudolf Schwarzkogler was a member of the Viennese Actionism group, which included artists like Günter Brus, Otto Mühl, and Hermann Nitsch.
- Howard Zieff was an American director, television commercial director, and advertising photographer.
